merged_events.event_description: Diplomatic relations established between the United States and Azerbaijan, but no mission yet opened.

evidence.quote: Diplomatic relations were established on February 19, 1992, when President George H.W. Bush announced the decision in a press statement.

merged_events.event_description: The American Embassy in Baku was opened with Robert Finn as Chargé d'Affaires ad interim.

evidence.quote: The American Embassy in Baku was opened on March 16, 1992, with Robert Finn as Chargé d'Affaires ad interim.

merged_events.event_description: U.S. Embassy established in Azerbaijan when the first Ambassador Extraordinary and Plenipotentiary, Richard Monroe Miles, presented credentials.

evidence.quote: Richard Monroe Miles, Ambassador Extraordinary and Plenipotentiary. Appointed: 1992-08-11. Credentials presented: 1992-09-16. Left post on 1993-11-15.

matched.notes: CSV date 1992-03-16 matches RDCR Event 1 exactly (Embassy opened in Baku). POCOM Event 2 gives 1992-09-16 (credential presentation of first ambassador), which is a later personnel event. RDCR provides the explicit institutional opening date and takes priority.

missing_from_csv.event_description: Diplomatic relations established between the United States and Azerbaijan when President George H.W. Bush announced the decision in a press statement. No mission was yet opened.
missing_from_csv.notes: High-confidence RDCR event. This represents the establishment of diplomatic relations prior to the opening of the Embassy on 1992-03-16. Should be added as a 'None' status event preceding the Embassy row.
